prompt:
Stylized animated-series full-body character asset, 9:16 vertical composition, entire figure visible head to toe, centered with generous empty margin.
Clean cartoon/anime-inspired rendering, readable silhouette, designed facial features, simplified anatomy, clean linework, flat-to-cel shaded color, no photorealism, no 3D render, no text, no watermark.
The character must be fully opaque. Avoid transparent clothing, transparent hair, motion blur, glow, cast shadows, and background objects.

Character description:
full-body anime-style girl with pastel pink twin tails, thin hair ribbons, pale yellow dress, narrow legs, small separated ribbon tails.

[BACKGROUND CONTRACT - black background, no extra outline]
1. Background: pure black (#000000), flat and edge-to-edge, no shading, gradient, texture, or scenery.
2. Character edge: keep only the character's natural cartoon/anime lineart. Do NOT add a white sticker outline, glow, rim light, halo, cast shadow, or border.
3. The character silhouette must remain readable against the black plate through normal lineart and internal color contrast.
4. Do NOT recolor black or white clothing; black clothing, white clothing, hair, eyes, accessories, and props must remain faithful to the character description.
